## Summary

Describe the pipeline template change and affected Jenkinsfiles, scripts, or catalogs.

## Validation

List the commands you ran, or explain why a command was not applicable.

## Checklist

- [ ] Repository URLs, credentials, branches, and approvals remain parameterized.
- [ ] Generated `out/` files are not committed.
- [ ] Destructive or production actions remain gated.
- [ ] Job blueprint docs are updated when pipeline behavior changes.
